tools.name: net.connect
tools.description: Initiate a connection to a specified peer.

tools.name: net.connections
tools.description: Returns an array of all peer connection statuses.

tools.name: net.disconnect
tools.description: Initiate disconnection from a specified peer.

tools.description: Retrieves the connection status for a specified peer.
